GenerationFailure.title: Generation Failure
GenerationFailure.description: Records of image generation failures and their corrections.

failureReason.description: The reason for failure (e.g., SAFETY, IMAGE_OTHER).

correctedPrompt.description: The prompt that successfully generated an image after correction.

category.description: The category of the image (main, detail, features).

generation_failures.description: A collection of generation failures and their successful corrections.
